summary: PHASE B (mock SMS phone OTP + view/edit mode lock) backend fully validated: 16/16 new tests pass + 47/47 regression tests pass = 63/63. Frontend visual smoke confirms: Edit Mode banner renders on fresh signup, Mobile Number row + Verify button visible, Save Changes bottom button present, and phone-edit invalidates the verified badge (badge disappears, Verify button reappears). Full OTP modal open/verify UI flow could not be confirmed end-to-end via headless Playwright because the AsyncStorage (IndexedDB-backed) token injection isn't picked up by the auth context after page navigation — the /api/profile/phone/send-otp call returns 401. All required testIDs (mock-otp-hint, otp-input, otp-verify, otp-cancel, otp-resend, phone-verified-badge, phone-verify-btn, edit-profile-btn, edit-profile-bottom-btn, cancel-edit-btn, save-profile, profile-name, profile-phone) are present in /app/frontend/app/student/profile.tsx. Main agent should self-verify the OTP modal flow via the real signup → email-verify → profile route in an actual browser session (or Expo Go), since the backend contract is solid and the UI testIDs are wired.

react_native_issues.issue: Console emits repeated warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. And: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Not blocking Phase B but pollutes logs. Reference: multiple components in /app/frontend/app and /app/frontend/src.

action_items: Main agent should manually open the app in a real browser preview, sign up a fresh student, type a phone number on profile.tsx and tap 'Verify' to confirm the OTP modal opens with mock-otp-hint visible, then complete the OTP entry → expect phone-verified-badge to render (one-time visual confirmation; backend behavior already verified).
[Optional] Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props → 'boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents' → 'style.pointerEvents' across the codebase to clean up the console (not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: Server PUT /profile correctly resets phone_verified=False when phone changes (line ~963-969 of server.py) and ignores client-supplied phone_verified — VERIFIED by test_client_supplied_phone_verified_ignored & test_client_supplied_phone_verified_ignored_when_already_verified.
/profile/phone/send-otp returns mock_otp in payload (mock SMS mode) — VERIFIED 6-digit numeric.
/profile/phone/verify-otp consumes OTP atomically and sets phone_verified=True with timestamp — VERIFIED.
Wrong OTP returns 400 'Incorrect OTP'; unknown/expired OTP returns 400 'OTP invalid or expired' — VERIFIED.
All 47 prior-iteration regression tests still pass — no regressions introduced.

success_rate.frontend: partial — visual elements rendered correctly; full OTP modal click-through not confirmed in headless

seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own throwaway student via signup+mock_otp; no shared seed data needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B backend endpoints (/api/profile/phone/send-otp, /api/profile/phone/verify-otp) are fully covered by tests/test_iteration_phaseb_phone_otp.py (16 tests). The PUT /profile guard (auto-reset phone_verified on phone change + ignore client-supplied phone_verified) is also covered there. Total backend tests: 63 passing (16 Phase B + 47 regression in test_referme_api.py). For frontend, when injecting auth into the Expo web preview from Playwright, note that the app uses AsyncStorage backed by IndexedDB (DB 'RKStorage', store 'catalystLocalStorage') with values JSON.stringify'd, but the auth context loads token ONCE on app boot — best to drive the actual login UI flow rather than inject storage directly.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found; all backend behavior matches spec. The headless UI flow gap is a test-harness limitation (AsyncStorage injection timing), not a product bug.
